cluster_fsm.spec_reference: Matter 1.5 Application Cluster Specification, Section 6.2, Pages 533-537

dependencies.description: Content App endpoints should have Application Basic cluster to identify the Content App

states.name: NotLoggedIn
states.description: No user account is active on the Content App for the invoking fabric/node. Default state for new nodes on the fabric.
states.safety_implications: Limited Content App functionality - user cannot access personalized content or services

states.name: LoggedIn
states.description: User account is active on the Content App. The node has been authenticated via successful Login command.
states.safety_implications: Privacy exposure - user's account, preferences, viewing history accessible to authorized nodes

states.name: RateLimited
states.description: The 10-request per 10-minute rate limit has been reached. This is a transient state affecting command processing.
states.safety_implications: Denial of service for legitimate users if attacker exhausts rate limit

transitions.name: GetSetupPIN_Success_AccountsMatch
transitions.timing_constraint: TempAccountIdentifier must be valid (max 10 minutes from issuance)
transitions.formal_description: Upon receipt, Content App checks if account associated with TempAccountIdentifier matches active account. If match, returns Setup PIN.

transitions.name: GetSetupPIN_Failure_AccountsMismatch

error_responses.description: Empty string indicates accounts do not match; not an error status

transitions.formal_description: Returns empty string to indicate that accounts do not match

transitions.name: GetSetupPIN_RateLimited

error_responses.condition: More than 10 requests in 10 minute window
error_responses.description: Rate limiting to prevent brute force attacks

transitions.spec_reference: Section 6.2.4.1 'The server SHALL implement rate limiting'
transitions.formal_description: No more than 10 unique requests in a 10 minute period SHALL be allowed

transitions.name: GetSetupPIN_TempIdExpired

error_responses.description: Expired identifier treated as non-matching account

transitions.spec_reference: Section 6.2.4.1 'Temporary Account Identifier... is not valid for more than 10 minutes'
transitions.formal_description: Content App ensures TempAccountIdentifier is not valid for more than 10 minutes

transitions.name: Login_Success
transitions.timing_constraint: TempAccountIdentifier must be valid; aggressive timeout on TempAccountIdentifier-to-PIN mapping recommended
transitions.formal_description: If Setup PIN is valid for user account associated with TempAccountIdentifier, Content App MAY make that user account active

transitions.name: Login_Failure_InvalidPIN

error_responses.condition: SetupPIN does not match the one associated with TempAccountIdentifier

transitions.formal_description: Content App checks if TempAccountIdentifier has current active Setup PIN with given value

transitions.name: Login_RateLimited

error_responses.condition: More than 10 requests in 10 minute window
error_responses.description: Rate limiting to prevent brute force attacks

transitions.spec_reference: Section 6.2.4.3 'The server SHALL implement rate limiting'
transitions.formal_description: No more than 10 unique requests in a 10 minute period SHALL be allowed

transitions.name: Login_TempIdExpired
transitions.spec_reference: Section 6.2.4.3 'Temporary Account Identifier... is not valid for more than 10 minutes'
transitions.formal_description: Content App ensures TempAccountIdentifier is not valid for more than 10 minutes

transitions.name: Login_AlreadyLoggedIn
transitions.formal_description: Allows additional nodes to be tracked for an already active account

transitions.name: Logout_WithNode
transitions.formal_description: Instruct Content App to clear current user account for specified Node

transitions.name: Logout_WithoutNode_AllNonAdmin
transitions.formal_description: If no Node provided, Fabric Admin SHALL remove access to all non-Admin Nodes

transitions.name: Logout_NotLoggedIn
transitions.formal_description: Logout when already logged out is a no-op success

transitions.name: LoggedOut_Event_Received
transitions.formal_description: In response to LoggedOut event, Fabric Admin SHALL remove access to Content App by specified Node

transitions.name: RateLimit_Reset
transitions.timing_constraint: 10 minutes from first request in window
transitions.formal_description: Rate limit counter resets after 10 minute window expires

transitions.name: TempAccountIdentifier_Expiry
transitions.spec_reference: Section 6.2.4.1 'not valid for more than 10 minutes'
transitions.formal_description: TempAccountIdentifier automatically invalidated after 10 minutes

transitions.name: Timed_Interaction_Timeout

error_responses.condition: Invoke Request arrives after Timed Request timeout
error_responses.description: Timed invoke transaction expired before command received

transitions.spec_reference: Core Spec Section 8.8.2.3 'Incoming Invoke Request Action'
transitions.formal_description: Commands requiring timed interaction must arrive within the timeout window defined by preceding Timed Request action

transitions.name: Access_Denied_NotAdmin_GetSetupPIN

error_responses.condition: Invoker does not have Administrator privilege

transitions.spec_reference: Section 6.2.4 Commands Table, Access: A F T
transitions.formal_description: GetSetupPIN command requires Administrator privilege level

transitions.name: Access_Denied_NotAdmin_Login

error_responses.condition: Invoker does not have Administrator privilege

transitions.spec_reference: Section 6.2.4 Commands Table, Access: A F T
transitions.formal_description: Login command requires Administrator privilege level

transitions.name: Access_Denied_NotOperate_Logout

error_responses.condition: Invoker does not have at least Operate privilege
error_responses.description: Logout requires at least Operate privilege

transitions.spec_reference: Section 6.2.4 Commands Table, Access: O F T
transitions.formal_description: Logout command requires at least Operate privilege level

transitions.name: NotTimedInvoke_GetSetupPIN

error_responses.condition: Command invoked without preceding Timed Request action

transitions.formal_description: GetSetupPIN command requires Timed Invoke transaction (T modifier)

transitions.name: NotTimedInvoke_Login

error_responses.condition: Command invoked without preceding Timed Request action

transitions.formal_description: Login command requires Timed Invoke transaction (T modifier)

transitions.name: NotTimedInvoke_Logout

error_responses.condition: Command invoked without preceding Timed Request action

transitions.formal_description: Logout command requires Timed Invoke transaction (T modifier)

transitions.name: NotFabricScoped_AnyCommand

error_responses.condition: Command invoked without valid fabric association
error_responses.description: All Account Login commands are fabric-scoped

transitions.formal_description: All commands require valid accessing fabric

transitions.name: TempAccountIdentifier_TooShort

error_responses.condition: TempAccountIdentifier field is less than 16 characters
error_responses.description: TempAccountIdentifier must be at least 16 characters

transitions.spec_reference: Section 6.2.4.1.1 'length of this field SHALL be at least 16 characters'
transitions.formal_description: TempAccountIdentifier constraint validation

transitions.name: SetupPIN_TooShort

error_responses.condition: SetupPIN field is less than 8 characters
error_responses.description: SetupPIN must be at least 8 characters

transitions.spec_reference: Section 6.2.4.3.2 'text string at least 8 characters in length'
transitions.formal_description: SetupPIN constraint validation

events.name: LoggedOut

fields.name: Node
fields.description: Node ID corresponding to the user account that has logged out, if available

events.description: Generated when current user has logged out. Fabric Admin SHALL remove access to Content App by specified Node. If no Node provided, Fabric Admin SHALL remove access to all non-Admin Nodes.

timers.name: RateLimitWindowTimer
timers.trigger: First GetSetupPIN or Login request received
timers.description: Tracks the 10-minute rate limiting window. No more than 10 unique requests allowed per window.

timers.name: TempAccountIdentifierTimer
timers.trigger: TempAccountIdentifier issued by central account service
timers.description: TempAccountIdentifier SHALL NOT be valid for more than 10 minutes

timers.name: TempIdToPinMappingTimer
timers.description: Implementations SHOULD impose aggressive timeouts for TempAccountIdentifier to Setup PIN mappings to prevent delayed login

timers.name: TimedInvokeTimer
timers.duration: As specified in Timed Request action
timers.description: Commands with T access modifier must be received within the Timed Request timeout window

functions.name: accounts_match

parameters.name: ContentAppAccount
parameters.description: Currently active account on Content App

functions.description: Determines if the account associated with TempAccountIdentifier is the same as the active account on the Content App. Method is outside the scope of Matter specification and typically involves a central service.

functions.name: PIN_valid
functions.description: Verifies if the account associated with TempAccountIdentifier has a current active Setup PIN matching the provided value. Method is outside the scope of Matter specification.

functions.name: activate_user_account
functions.description: Makes the user account associated with TempAccountIdentifier active on the Content App. Uses MAY language in spec - not guaranteed.

functions.name: track_node
functions.description: Tracks the Node ID for access management. Used to identify which nodes have access to the Content App.

functions.name: clear_user_account_for_node
functions.description: Clears the user account session for the specified node.

functions.name: clear_all_non_admin_accounts
functions.description: Clears access for all non-Admin nodes. Triggered when Logout is invoked without Node field.

functions.name: has_privilege
functions.description: Checks if the invoking node has the required privilege level per the ACL. Defined in Core Spec Section 7.6.

functions.name: invalidate_temp_account_identifier
functions.description: Marks a TempAccountIdentifier as no longer valid. Called when 10-minute validity expires.

safety_critical_elements.safety_concern: Successful Login grants access to user's Content App account, exposing personal content and preferences
safety_critical_elements.mitigation_in_spec: Multiple mitigations: Admin privilege required, Timed interaction required, rate limiting (10 req/10 min), TempAccountIdentifier validity limit (10 min), PIN validation

safety_critical_elements.safety_concern: GetSetupPIN returns sensitive credential that can be used for PASE commissioning
safety_critical_elements.mitigation_in_spec: Admin privilege required, Timed interaction required, rate limiting, account match verification, user consent prompt prior to commissioning

safety_critical_elements.safety_concern: If Fabric Admin fails to process LoggedOut event, stale access grants remain in place
safety_critical_elements.mitigation_in_spec: CRITICAL priority ensures timely delivery; SHALL language for admin action. However, actual removal is implementation-dependent.

safety_critical_elements.safety_concern: User privacy - logged in state exposes account to all authorized nodes on fabric
safety_critical_elements.mitigation_in_spec: Fabric scoping limits exposure to single fabric; Admin privilege required to Login; explicit Logout mechanism

safety_critical_elements.safety_concern: Legitimate users denied service if attacker exhausts rate limit quota
safety_critical_elements.mitigation_in_spec: Admin privilege required limits who can trigger rate limiting; 10-minute reset window

spec_gaps.description: Rate limiting of 10 requests per 10 minutes allows 1,440 attempts per day. No exponential backoff or permanent lockout specified.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Low-rate sustained brute force attacks possible. Weak PINs (birthdays, patterns) vulnerable within days.

spec_gaps.description: No PIN complexity requirements beyond minimum 8 characters. No requirement for mixed case, numbers, special characters.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Weak PINs like '00000000' or '12345678' are permitted, drastically reducing effective entropy.

spec_gaps.description: Account verification method is 'outside the scope of this specification'. Security depends entirely on external service implementation.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Matter spec cannot guarantee account security. Vulnerabilities in external account service propagate to Matter ecosystem.

spec_gaps.description: 'Content App MAY make that user account active' uses MAY, not SHALL. Successful Login does not guarantee account activation.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Inconsistent implementations possible. Users may retry Login unnecessarily, increasing attack surface exposure.

spec_gaps.description: Access removal mechanism and timing not specified. 'Fabric Admin SHALL remove access' but how and when is implementation-dependent.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Window between LoggedOut event and actual access removal creates opportunity for continued unauthorized access.

spec_gaps.description: No session timeout or automatic logout specified after Login success. Access persistence is undefined.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Once logged in, access may persist indefinitely without explicit Logout, creating long-lived session risk.

spec_gaps.description: 'Implementations... should impose aggressive time outs' uses SHOULD (lowercase), not SHALL, for TempAccountIdentifier to PIN mapping.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Long-lived mappings enable delayed Login attacks after legitimate user's session expectation ends.

spec_gaps.description: No specification of how rate limit counter is managed per-fabric vs. globally, or how multiple concurrent sessions are handled.
spec_gaps.security_impact: Implementation variations could allow rate limit bypass through fabric manipulation.

spec_gaps.description: 'No more than 10 unique requests in a 10 minute period' - unclear if 'unique' means unique TempAccountIdentifiers or unique request instances.
spec_gaps.security_impact: If unique means unique identifiers, attacker could submit multiple requests with same identifier without hitting limit.

proverif_query_suggestions.query: query tempId:string, pin:string, invoker:node; event(login_success(tempId, invoker)) ==> event(pin_validated(tempId, pin))
proverif_query_suggestions.description: Login success implies valid PIN was verified

proverif_query_suggestions.query: query invoker:node, cmd:command; event(command_executed(cmd, invoker)) ==> event(privilege_verified(invoker, cmd.required_privilege))
proverif_query_suggestions.description: All commands execute only after privilege verification
No more than 10 GetSetupPIN requests in any 10-minute window
Commands requiring timed interaction only execute within valid timed transaction
LoggedOut event causes access removal for specified node
